hybrid_win.query_snippet:
TITLE: Support a pty interface

BODY:
Deno should support forking of pty interfaces (psuedo terminals) which would allow Deno workloads to be able to "pretend" to be a terminal, which can allow Deno workloads to be a terminal emulator or allow certain programs to think a Deno workload is an terminal
